docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANSURY, CHRISTOPHER , AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT VILA, RICHARD , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
